inputs.label: Annual Production Volume
inputs.businessContext: Total annual production of paint and coating in tons. Based on industry benchmarks (e.g., WERC).

inputs.label: Batch Size
inputs.businessContext: Typical batch size for production. Affects setup costs and efficiency. Lean manufacturing principles (JIT).

inputs.label: Raw Material Cost per Ton
inputs.businessContext: Cost of raw materials (resins, pigments, solvents) per ton. Based on market prices and ISO 14000 environmental cost accounting.

inputs.label: Labor Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Hourly labor cost including benefits. Standard industrial engineering cost estimation (Maynard).

inputs.label: Labor Hours per Batch
inputs.businessContext: Direct labor hours required per batch. Based on time studies (Salvendy).

inputs.label: Energy Cost per kWh
inputs.businessContext: Cost of electricity per kWh. ISO 50001 energy management standard.

inputs.label: Energy Consumption per Batch
inputs.businessContext: Energy used per batch (mixing, heating, drying). ISO 50001.

inputs.label: Defect Rate
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of batches that are defective. Six Sigma quality metric (DPMO).

inputs.label: Rework Cost per Ton
inputs.businessContext: Cost to rework defective product per ton. Includes material, labor, energy. ISO 9001 quality management.

inputs.label: Setup Time per Batch
inputs.businessContext: Time to setup equipment between batches. SMED (Single-Minute Exchange of Die) lean tool.

inputs.label: Setup Cost per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Cost of setup labor and overhead per hour. Based on activity-based costing.

inputs.label: Waste Disposal Cost per Ton
inputs.businessContext: Cost to dispose of waste per ton. Environmental regulations (ISO 14000).

inputs.label: Waste Rate
inputs.businessContext: Fraction of raw material that becomes waste. Lean manufacturing waste reduction.

inputs.label: Data Confidence
inputs.businessContext: Confidence level in input data accuracy. Used for risk adjustment.

thresholds.defectRate > 0.05: Critical: Defect rate exceeds 5% - immediate quality improvement needed.
thresholds.wasteRate > 0.1: Warning: Waste rate above 10% - review material efficiency.
thresholds.setupTimePerBatch > 4: Warning: Setup time exceeds 4 hours - consider SMED implementation.
thresholds.energyConsumptionPerBatch > 1000: Warning: High energy consumption per batch - energy audit recommended.

formulas.totalAnnualCost: annualProductionVolume * (rawMaterialCostPerTon + (laborCostPerHour * laborHoursPerBatch / batchSize) + (energyCostPerKwh * energyConsumptionPerBatch / batchSize) + (defectRate * reworkCostPerTon) + (setupTimePerBatch * setupCostPerHour / batchSize) + (wasteRate * wasteDisposalCostPerTon))

suggestedActions: defectRate > 0.05 ? 'Implement Six Sigma DMAIC to reduce defects' : ''
wasteRate > 0.1 ? 'Conduct waste stream analysis and improve material utilization' : ''
setupTimePerBatch > 4 ? 'Apply SMED techniques to reduce setup time' : ''
energyConsumptionPerBatch > 1000 ? 'Perform energy audit and optimize drying/curing processes' : ''
